# Tim Frank Andersen

> Keynote speaker and moderator on AI and technology, based in Copenhagen, Denmark. 30 years in tech - from founding one of Denmark's first digital agencies (Networkers, 1995) to co-founding Institute of AI (2023). Booked directly through this site.

## What Tim does

- Keynote: "The AI Explosion" - what's real, what's next, and what's in it for you. Live demos, honest answers, and a look at the next 12-24 months. Delivered in Danish or English.
- Moderator: ties conferences together with sharp questions and a clear thread.
- Booking: https://www.timfrankandersen.com/speaking (direct, no agency required)

## Background

- M.Sc. in Computer Science. Founded Networkers (1995), merged into Framfab (IPO 1999), SVP building the brand across 17 countries. Co-founded WHERE2GO (acquired by Aller, 2005). Partner and executive chairman of In2media 2006-2020 (acquired by KMD, renamed Charlie Tango, 2017). Co-founded Liveshopper (2020, backed by BOOZT) and Institute of AI (2023), where he helps organisations build their AI strategy.
- Author of "Brand Building on the Internet". Tech expert on Danish national morning TV for eight years; hosted TV2's "Denmark's Best Idea" (2007).
- Advisor to brands including Nike, Pandora, Kellogg's and Unilever.
- Investor: Pentimenti (chairman of the board), Omorpho, Kvantify, Manyone, and LP in Ugly Duckling Ventures. Not currently taking on new investments.

## Pages

- [Speaking and booking](https://www.timfrankandersen.com/speaking): formats, testimonials, booking form
- [Daily AI news](https://www.timfrankandersen.com/news): the 5 AI news stories that matter, curated by Tim every morning, with free email newsletter
- [AI Curriculum](https://www.timfrankandersen.com/curriculum): the AI knowledge platform Tim built for executive leaders (https://www.aicurriculum.dk)
- [Ten AI predictions](https://www.timfrankandersen.com/predictions): Tim's annual predictions since 2020
- [About](https://www.timfrankandersen.com/about): full bio, career timeline, Institute of AI, investments

- Booking and enquiries: https://www.timfrankandersen.com/speaking or tim@frankandersen.com
